services.title: Service Management
services.subtitle: Run white-listed server operations (pm2 / nginx / certbot). Every command is executed via execFile with strict parameter validation — user input is never passed to a shell.
services.reloadNginxDesc: Test (nginx -t) and reload the Nginx configuration.
services.renewSslDesc: Run certbot renew to renew TLS certificates.
services.updateNginxConfigDesc: Generate and write the site config from domain / port / email, then reload.
services.restoreDefaultConfigDesc: Overwrite the active config with the built-in default template, then reload.
services.emptyOutput: No output yet. Run an action to see its log.
services.invalidDomain: Please enter a valid domain (e.g. www.example.com).
services.invalidPort: Port must be an integer between 80 and 65535.
services.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
services.permissionNote: Note: nginx -s reload and certbot renew usually require root / restricted sudo. If an action fails, ask the operator to grant the limited privilege or run it manually.
payment.title: Payment Gateway Configuration
payment.subtitle: Connect Stripe, PayPal, WeChat Pay and Alipay. Follow the steps below to obtain API keys, then paste them into the corresponding site settings.
payment.note: Demo notice: live charges are disabled in this build. WeChat Pay and Alipay run in mock/sandbox mode. Stripe and PayPal require real keys from your own merchant account.
payment.stripeDesc: Global card payments. Get your publishable and secret keys from the Stripe Dashboard.
payment.stripeStep1: Create a Stripe account and complete the activation steps.
payment.stripeStep2: Go to Developers → API keys and copy the Publishable key and Secret key.
payment.stripeStep3: Paste both keys into Site Settings → Payments (Stripe keys).
payment.paypalDesc: Pay with PayPal balance or linked cards. Use the REST API credentials.
payment.paypalStep1: Create a PayPal Business account at developer.paypal.com.
payment.paypalStep2: In My Apps & Credentials, create an app and copy the Client ID and Secret.
payment.paypalStep3: Paste the credentials into Site Settings → Payments (PayPal keys).
payment.wechatNote: Mock mode only in this build. Real integration needs a verified WeChat Pay merchant ID, API key and the MP certificate. Orders are marked paid automatically for demo purposes.
payment.alipayNote: Mock mode only in this build. Real integration needs an Alipay open-platform app ID, private key and Alipay public key. Orders are marked paid automatically for demo purposes.
services.certSubtitle: List certbot-managed domains, renew, re-apply or manually upload certificates.
services.certUploadHint: Only .crt/.pem certificates and .key private keys are accepted; files must be non-empty and valid PEM.
services.certApplyEmailHint: Please fill in the application email above first.
services.certUploadRequired: Please select both a certificate and a private key file.
services.certUploadExt: Certificate must be .crt/.pem and key must be .key.
services.certbotUnavailable: certbot is not installed on this server; only manual certificate upload is supported.
users.resetPasswordConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset this user's password? This cannot be undone.
users.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
users.passwordMismatch: The two passwords do not match.
users.resetPasswordFailed: Failed to reset password. Please try again.
